Weinberg, Esq., DEVELBISS, DIVELBEISS & BONZELL appeared on behalf of defendant Bank of the West.

After argument the tentative ruling was adopted as the order of the court: Defendant RORY O'BRIAN's motion to stay action and discovery is granted. Action and discovery stayed as to all parties. (JJM/MD) Reporter: Eric Throne, CSR # 7855
